claim: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) Compensating general schools without structural change risks legitimising and permanently entrenching the selective structure's segregating effect rather than fixing it, so it is acceptable only as a time-bounded interim measure with published segregation-reduction targets and a stated structural trajectory, not as a substitute for eventual structural reform.
interest: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) the concern(s) raised by eselyegyenlosegi_civil, oktataspolitikai_reformmozgalom, fuggetlen_szakpolitikai_kutatomuhely
value: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) a trade-off between the scenario's stated goal and the concern raised
fear: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) the benefit claimed will not materialise as described
assumption: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) the claim's premise holds under implementation as designed
empirical_uncertainty: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) not independently graded here — see the evidence layer
